User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the AgriLoop platform, either a seller or a buyer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity (Firebase Auth UID).

role.description: The role of the user on the platform, either 'seller' or 'buyer'.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

businessName.description: Optional: The name of the user's business, if applicable (for sellers).

rcNumber.description: Optional: The registration number of the user's company (for CAC verification).

bvn.description: The Bank Verification Number (BVN) of the user, used for identity verification.

bvnVerified.description: Indicates if the user's BVN has been successfully verified.

cacVerified.description: Indicates if the user's CAC (Corporate Affairs Commission) details have been successfully verified.

verificationStatus.description: The current status of the user's verification process.

verifiedAt.description: Optional: Timestamp when the user's profile was last verified.

address.description: The physical address of the user or their business.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the user's location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the user's location.

badge.description: The verification badge level awarded to the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Listing.title: Listing
Listing.description: Represents an agricultural waste listing posted by a seller.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Listing entity.

sellerId.description: Reference to the User entity who is selling this listing. (Relationship: User 1:N Listing)

sellerName.description: Denormalized name of the seller for display purposes.

sellerBadge.description: Denormalized verification badge of the seller for display purposes.

wasteType.description: The specific type of agricultural waste being sold.

wasteTypeLabel.description: A human-readable label for the waste type.

condition.description: The condition of the waste, e.g., 'fresh', 'dried', 'mixed'.

quantityKg.description: The total quantity of waste available, in kilograms (KG).

pricePerKg.description: The price per kilogram of the waste.

totalPrice.description: The auto-calculated total price for the entire quantity.

moqKg.description: Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) in kilograms required for purchase.

qualityGrade.description: The quality grade of the waste, e.g., 'premium', 'standard', 'mixed'.

availableFrom.description: Timestamp indicating when the listing becomes available.

availableUntil.description: Optional: Timestamp indicating when the listing expires.

locationAddress.description: The physical address where the waste can be picked up or shipped from.

locationLatitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the listing's location.

locationLongitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the listing's location.

locationGeohash.description: A geohash string for efficient geospatial queries based on location coordinates.

description.description: Optional: A detailed description of the waste product.

images.description: Optional: An array of URLs to images of the waste product.

status.description: The current status of the listing, e.g., 'active', 'sold', 'expired', 'draft'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the listing was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the listing was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a purchase order made by a buyer for an agricultural waste listing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

listingId.description: Reference to the Listing entity that was purchased. (Relationship: Listing 1:N Order)

listingSnapshotId.description: Snapshot: ID of the listing at the time of order creation.

listingSnapshotWasteType.description: Snapshot: The waste type from the listing at the time of order.

listingSnapshotWasteTypeLabel.description: Snapshot: The human-readable label for the waste type at the time of order.

listingSnapshotCondition.description: Snapshot: The condition of the waste at the time of order.

listingSnapshotPricePerKg.description: Snapshot: Price per KG from the listing at the time of order.

listingSnapshotMoqKg.description: Snapshot: Minimum order quantity from the listing at the time of order.

listingSnapshotQualityGrade.description: Snapshot: Quality grade from the listing at the time of order.

listingSnapshotAvailableFrom.description: Snapshot: Availability start date from the listing at the time of order.

listingSnapshotAvailableUntil.description: Snapshot: Optional availability end date from the listing at the time of order.

listingSnapshotDescription.description: Snapshot: Optional description from the listing at the time of order.

listingSnapshotImages.description: Snapshot: Optional array of image URLs from the listing at the time of order.

buyerId.description: Reference to the User entity who placed the order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

buyerName.description: Denormalized name of the buyer for display purposes.

sellerId.description: Reference to the User entity who is selling the listing. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

sellerName.description: Denormalized name of the seller for display purposes.

quantityKg.description: The quantity of waste ordered by the buyer, in kilograms (KG).

pricePerKg.description: The price per kilogram agreed upon for this order.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount for this order.

deliveryMethod.description: The chosen method of delivery, 'self_pickup' or 'request_delivery'.

status.description: The current status of the order in its lifecycle.

interswitchRef.description: The Interswitch payment reference for the transaction.

transactionRef.description: The internal transaction reference used for the payment.

paymentPaidAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was made.

paymentVerifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was verified by Interswitch.

timelineOrderedAt.description: Timestamp marking when the order was initially placed.

timelinePaidAt.description: Optional: Timestamp marking when the order payment was successfully processed.

timelineConfirmedAt.description: Optional: Timestamp marking when the seller confirmed the order.

timelineReadyAt.description: Optional: Timestamp marking when the order was ready for pickup/delivery.

timelineCompletedAt.description: Optional: Timestamp marking when the order was marked as completed.

timelineCancelledAt.description: Optional: Timestamp marking when the order was cancelled.

pickupLocationAddress.description: The address specified for order pickup.

pickupLocationLatitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the pickup location.

pickupLocationLongitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the pickup location.

pickupLocationContactPhone.description: The contact phone number for pickup arrangements.

disputeReason.description: Optional: A description of the reason if the order is disputed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles, identified by their Firebase Auth UID. Each document contains the user's role, verification status, personal, business, and location details. Access is restricted to the user whose ID matches the document ID (path-based ownership).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier (Firebase Auth UID) for the user.

definition.description: Stores agricultural waste listings posted by sellers. Each document includes denormalized 'sellerId', 'sellerName', and 'sellerBadge' for authorization independence and display. Publicly readable, but write access is restricted to the 'sellerId' owner.

params.name: listingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the listing.

definition.description: Stores purchase orders for listings. Each document includes denormalized 'buyerId' and 'sellerId' for authorization independence, allowing both parties to access their relevant orders. It also contains a 'listingSnapshot' for historical immutability. Read/write access is granted to either the buyer or the seller.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.
